parameters.query:
UPDATE "auxiliary.employersData"
SET
  status_funcionario      = $1,
  nome_cargo_funcionario  = $2,
  updated_at              = (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
WHERE matricula_funcionario = $3
  AND (
    status_funcionario     IS DISTINCT FROM $1
    OR nome_cargo_funcionario IS DISTINCT FROM $2
  )
RETURNING matricula_funcionario, nome_funcionario, status_funcionario, nome_cargo_funcionario;
